description: Commit all changes to a new feature branch (feat/task-manager-mvp). Do NOT push - just create the local branch and commit.
steps: Create and switch to new branch: git checkout -b feat/task-manager-mvp
Stage all new/modified files: git add -A
Commit with message: feat: add personal task manager MVP with Supabase auth and CRUD
Verify branch exists and commit is present: git log --oneline -3
acceptance_criteria: Branch has NOT been pushed to remote
verification: export PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-tasks-manager && git branch --list feat/task-manager-mvp && git log --oneline -2
